zh.lifeSummary: 當Sven Gunnarsson於1610年出生在瑞典維亞姆藍德艾爾奧時，他的父親Gunnar Jonsson35歲，母親Giertrudh30歲。他於1630年與Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg在瑞典達拉納斯卡拉波格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1676年住在美國賓夕法尼亞州切斯特。他去世於1677年11月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞金辛享年67歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sven Gunnarsson于1610年出生在瑞典維亞姆藍德艾爾奧时，他的父亲Gunnar Jonsson35岁，母亲Giertrudh30岁。他于1630年与Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg在瑞典達拉納斯卡拉波格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1676年住在美国宾夕法尼亚州切斯特。他去世于1677年11月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞金辛享年67岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞。

nameMeanings.name: Gunnarsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Agust, Lennart, Nils, Sven, Thor.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish and Icelandic Gunnarsson: patronymic from the personal name Gunnar, from Old Norse Gunnarr, a compound of gunn ‘battle’ + arr ‘warrior’. Compare Gunderson and Gunnerson .
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Gunnarsen, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gunderson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Gundersen or its cognate Gunnersen (see Gunnerson ), and also of Swedish and Icelandic Gunnarsson (see Gunnarson ). This form of the surname is also found in Sweden (also Gundersson), but it is very rare there.

variants.name: Gunnerson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish and Icelandic Gunnarsson (see Gunnarson ) and of the Norwegian and Danish cognates Gunnersen or Gundersen . Compare Gunderson .

nameMeanings.name: Sven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Old Norse byname Sveinn ‘boy, lad’. It is now also used occasionally in England, perhaps with reference to the England (football team) coach, Sven Göran Eriksson ( b. 1948 ), and in the United States.

variants.name: Svend
meanings: from the Old Norse byname Sveinn ‘boy, lad’. It is now also used occasionally in England, perhaps with reference to the England (football team) coach, Sven Göran Eriksson ( b. 1948 ), and in the United States.

variants.name: Svein
meanings: from the Old Norse byname Sveinn ‘boy, lad’. It is now also used occasionally in England, perhaps with reference to the England (football team) coach, Sven Göran Eriksson ( b. 1948 ), and in the United States.

historicEvents.description: Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.
Swedish warship Vasa sank in Stockholm harbor. 25 drowned.

historicEvents.title: The Thirty Years' War
historicEvents.description: King Gustavus Adolphus entered Sweden into the Thirty Years' War in 1630 with great success on the side of the German Protestants.
Queen Christina abdicated throne. Converted to Catholicism, later buried in Rome in St. Peter's.

en.lifeSummary: When Sven Gunnarsson was born in 1610, in Elgå, Värmland, Sweden, his father, Gunnar Jonsson, was 35 and his mother, Giertrudh, was 30. He married Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg in 1630, in Skaraborg, Dalarna, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Chester, Pennsylvania, United States in 1676. He died on 13 November 1677, in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 67, and was buried in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sven Gunnarsson est né en 1610, à Elgå, Värmland, Suède, son père, Gunnar Jonsson, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Giertrudh, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg en 1630, à Skaraborg, Dalarna, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Chester, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1676. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1677, à Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Philadelphie, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sven Gunnarsson 1610 in Elgå, Värmland, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gunnar Jonsson 35 und seine Mutter Giertrudh 30. Er hat 1630 in Skaraborg, Dalarna, Schweden Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1676 hat er in Chester, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 13. November 1677 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America und wurde in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sven Gunnarsson è nato il nel 1610 nel Elgå, Värmland, Svezia, il suo padre, Gunnar Jonsson, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Giertrudh, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg nel 1630, nel Skaraborg, Dalarna, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Chester, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1676. Morì il 13 novembre 1677, nel Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Filadelfia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sven Gunnarssonが1610年にスウェーデンvaルムランドエルグaで生まれた時，父Gunnar Jonssonは35歳，母Giertrudhは30歳であった。1630年にスウェーデンダラーナスカラボルグでBriggetta Matteson Jestenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年にはアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州チェスターに住んでいた。彼は1677年11月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアキングセシングで67歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアフィラデルフィアにて埋葬された。

ko.Philadelphia, Pennsylvania Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아
ko.Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 킨그세징
ko.lifeSummary: Sven Gunnarsson(이)가 1610년 스웨덴 브a랜드 엘그a에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gunnar Jonsson(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Giertrudh(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1630년 스웨덴 다라른아 스카라볼그에서 Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1676년도에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 체스터에서 살았다. 그는 1677년 11월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 킨그세징에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sven Gunnarsson nasceu em 1610, em Elgå, Värmland, Suécia, seu pai, Gunnar Jonsson, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Giertrudh, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg em 1630, em Skaraborg, Dalarna, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Chester, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1676. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1677, em Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Filadélfia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sven Gunnarsson родился в 1610 г. в местности элгa, вaрмланд, Швеция, его отцу по имени Gunnar Jonsson было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Giertrudh, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg в 1630 г. в местности скараборг, даларна, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности честир, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1676 году. Он умер 13 ноября 1677 г. в местности кингсессинг, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика.
